Index.meta_title: SmartStore AI - Store operations, orders, and delivery.
Index.meta_description: An all-in-one platform for products, orders, customers, manual payments, delivery, invoices, and AI operations.

Hero.follow_twitter: Complete commerce operations with AI, delivery, and manual payments
Hero.title: <important>SmartStore AI</important> brings your store, orders, payments, delivery, and AI into one dashboard.
Hero.description: Run web and WhatsApp orders, manage the catalog, support delivery and pickup payments, and track customer operations clearly.

Features.section_title: Everything a store needs to operate and sell
Features.section_description: The platform supports orders, catalog, customer channels, manual customer payments, invoices, reports, and AI according to the selected package.
Features.feature1_description: Customer requests are organized into clear order drafts with items, contact details, notes, and missing information for review.
Features.feature2_description: Manage products, prices, categories, descriptions, and images from a catalog designed for fast updates and daily use.
Features.feature3_description: Share your store link and receive orders from web and WhatsApp on every package, with usage limits based on the selected package.
Features.feature4_description: AI-assisted orders stay under store control, so the team can review, adjust, approve, and continue with confidence.
Features.feature5_description: Enable delivery and pickup payment options and invoices from store settings. Online payment rails are reserved for a later activation.
Features.feature6_description: Keep customer activity, order history, revenue signals, conversations, and review follow-up visible in one dashboard.

Pricing.section_title: Choose the package that fits your store size
Pricing.section_description: Starter for launch, Growth for active stores, and Pro for larger stores that need higher limits and advanced reporting.

PricingCard.free_plan_description: For account creation only. Store operations require a paid package.
PricingCard.starter_plan_description: For new stores that want web orders and basic AI limits.
PricingCard.growth_plan_description: For active stores that need higher AI limits, a larger catalog, and more team capacity.
PricingCard.pro_plan_description: For larger stores that need advanced reports, a bigger catalog, higher AI capacity, and a larger team.

FAQ.section_title: What to know before creating a store workspace
FAQ.section_description: Short answers to the points that matter before setup, launch, and day-to-day operation.
FAQ.question_1: What problem does SmartStore AI solve?
FAQ.answer_1: It gives stores one operating workspace for products, customer entry, order review, payment and delivery setup, customer activity, and AI-assisted follow-up.
FAQ.question_2: Are online payments available for stores?
FAQ.answer_2: Not yet. Stores currently use delivery and pickup payment options. Online payment rails are prepared technically and will be activated later.
FAQ.question_3: Can the store manage products in bulk?
FAQ.answer_3: Yes. Products can be added one by one or imported in batches, including core details such as price, category, description, and images.
FAQ.question_4: How do customers reach the store?
FAQ.answer_4: The store can share one smart entry link. Customers complete orders through the web form or WhatsApp when the store adds its WhatsApp number.
FAQ.answer_5: The store manages its package and extra capacity from the subscription page, and limits are reflected directly in the dashboard.
FAQ.question_6: Is this ready for production operations?
FAQ.answer_6: Yes. The platform supports core and advanced operations. Each store should complete business, payment, delivery, and support details before launching to customers.

CTA.title: A focused workflow from customer request to fulfillment
CTA.description: The platform is organized around the few steps that matter most for a store team: capture the request, prepare the order, approve the next action, and keep fulfillment visible.
CTA.update_1_description: Build a clean source of truth for products, services, prices, categories, descriptions, and images.
CTA.update_2_description: Customer requests become structured drafts that the store can approve, adjust, or follow up on.
CTA.update_3_description: Monitor channels, payments, delivery options, AI setup, launch readiness, and subscription usage from the dashboard.
CTA.closing_note: SmartStore AI is designed to make daily store operations more controlled, visible, and ready to scale.

About.title: Built for stores that need control before automation.
About.paragraph_1: SmartStore AI is not a generic chatbot layer. It is an operating environment for stores that need organized product data, reviewed customer orders, clear fulfillment steps, and practical team visibility.
About.paragraph_2: The product keeps automation close to the workflow without removing store judgment. AI helps structure requests and reduce repetitive work, while the team remains responsible for approval, payment, delivery, and customer communication.
About.paragraph_3: Our priority is a calm, reliable dashboard that helps stores run better every day, then scale with usage, channels, and team size when the operation is ready.

SignIn.meta_description: Seamlessly sign in to your account with our user-friendly login process.

SignUp.meta_description: Effortlessly create an account through our intuitive sign-up process.

DashboardLayout.meta_description: Manage products, customer channels, orders, payments, AI operations, and reviews.

DashboardIndexPage.kpi_cards_description: A quick scorecard of the most important store metrics for tracking performance.
DashboardIndexPage.welcome_message: Start by adding your products or services, then share your store link with customers across your connected channels. AI helps understand conversations and organize requests, while review, approval, and sensitive actions stay inside the store dashboard.
DashboardIndexPage.smart_hub_title: One control hub for orders, channels, payments, and follow-up
DashboardIndexPage.quick_actions_desc: Move between the main store tasks without losing context.
DashboardIndexPage.quick_payments_desc: Configure how customers pay and receive orders
DashboardIndexPage.capabilities_title: What the AI agent helps with
DashboardIndexPage.capability_understand_desc: Extract customer intent, requested items, missing details, and channel context.
DashboardIndexPage.capability_decide_desc: Prepare the order context and highlight what needs selection, review, or store approval.
DashboardIndexPage.capability_follow_desc: Keep payment, fulfillment, delivery, and reviews visible to the team without taking over sensitive actions.
DashboardIndexPage.workflow_desc: Each order conversation moves through a clear path from customer message to store approval.
DashboardIndexPage.workflow_receive_desc: Collect customer messages from multiple channels in one place.
DashboardIndexPage.workflow_ai_desc: AI reads the conversation, structures items, and prepares the order context.
DashboardIndexPage.workflow_confirm_desc: Review and approve from the store dashboard, then continue the conversation with less manual work.
DashboardIndexPage.platforms_desc: Web order and WhatsApp are available on every package, and the smart link routes customers based on the store setup.
DashboardIndexPage.setup_description: Finish the core setup steps so customers can browse products, contact you, pay, and receive orders without manual gaps.

TermsPage.meta_description: Terms for using SmartStore AI store operations services.
TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.description: These terms explain the expected use of SmartStore AI for store operations, orders, payments, delivery, and AI-assisted workflows.
TermsPage.section_1_body: SmartStore AI is provided to help stores organize products, customer requests, orders, payments, delivery options, and AI-assisted workflows. You are responsible for the accuracy of store data, product information, prices, and customer communications entered into the platform.
TermsPage.section_2_body: Features may be improved or expanded over time. Some workflows may require store review before customer communication, payment, delivery, or fulfillment is completed.
TermsPage.section_3_body: You are responsible for protecting your account access, inviting trusted team members only, and reviewing AI-created drafts before sending confirmations, payment instructions, or operational messages to customers.
TermsPage.section_4_body: SmartStore AI should not be treated as legal, financial, tax, or compliance advice. Stores should verify business requirements, customer policies, payment rules, and local regulations before launch.
TermsPage.section_5_body: These terms are governed by the laws and regulations applicable in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, unless another applicable legal arrangement is required by law.

PrivacyPage.meta_description: Privacy information for SmartStore AI users and stores.
PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.description: This policy explains the types of information SmartStore AI may process to operate store workflows and customer requests.
PrivacyPage.section_1_body: The platform may process account details, store settings, product information, customer records, order details, payment configuration, delivery options, uploaded images, and messages connected to store operations.
PrivacyPage.section_2_body: Information is used to run the dashboard, organize products and orders, support customer workflows, improve automation, and help store teams review activity from one workspace.
PrivacyPage.section_3_body: Sign-in and account protection are handled through trusted service providers. The platform may also use secure services for files, payments, messaging, analytics, monitoring, and AI-assisted workflows.
PrivacyPage.section_4_body: Stores should avoid entering unnecessary sensitive information and should keep access limited to trusted team members. We apply security measures appropriate to the services used by the platform.
PrivacyPage.section_5_body: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data according to applicable laws. You may also withdraw consent where legally and operationally possible.
PrivacyPage.section_6_body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be published on this page, and continued use of the service means acceptance of the updated policy.
PrivacyPage.section_7_body: For questions about privacy, terms, or data handling, contact us at support@smartstore.ai. Production stores should also publish official commercial registration and customer support details.

LaunchReadinessPage.store_description: Store name, description, and welcome message should be ready before the store appears to customers.

LaunchReadinessPage.products_description: {count, plural, =0 {No products are currently available in the catalog.} one {One product is currently available in the catalog.} other {# products are currently available in the catalog.}}
LaunchReadinessPage.payments_description: {count, plural, =0 {No active payment methods are configured for customer orders.} one {One payment method is configured for customer orders.} other {# payment methods are configured for customer orders.}}
LaunchReadinessPage.delivery_description: {count, plural, =0 {No active delivery or pickup options are configured.} one {One delivery or pickup option is configured.} other {# delivery or pickup options are configured.}}
LaunchReadinessPage.channels_description: Reviews the customer entry points enabled by the store, such as the web link or WhatsApp when its number is configured.
LaunchReadinessPage.ai_description: Checks that the AI employee is enabled and that the model provider is ready before using it in customer conversations.
LaunchReadinessPage.legal_description: Terms and privacy pages are published and linked from the landing page.

CustomerConnectPage.subtitle: Choose order channel
